entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched as OKEx in 2017 and rebranded to OKX in January 2022, currently offering spot, derivatives, options, staking, institutional, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: The previous 2013 marker conflated the broader Okcoin lineage with the dedicated OKEx / OKX exchange. Current first-party OKX materials consistently identify the exchange as founded in 2017, so the canonical launch marker is corrected to 2017.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the OKX brand.
expected.notes: Current OKX materials describe the exchange as founded in 2017, while this record preserves earlier lineage to the Okcoin/OKEx ecosystem in the stored launch date.

changes.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched as OKEx in 2017 and rebranded to OKX in January 2022, currently offering spot, derivatives, options, staking, institutional, and related digital-asset services.
changes.notes: The previous 2013 marker conflated the broader Okcoin lineage with the dedicated OKEx / OKX exchange. Current first-party OKX materials consistently identify the exchange as founded in 2017, so the canonical launch marker is corrected to 2017.

events.title: OKEx exchange launched in 2017
events.description: OKX first-party materials identify the dedicated centralized exchange, originally branded OKEx, as founded in 2017.
events.notes: January 1 is retained as a year-level marker because the reviewed official materials establish the year rather than one canonical launch day.

events.title: OKEx rebranded to OKX
events.description: OKEx announced a company-wide rebrand to OKX on January 18, 2022 as the platform expanded beyond its original centralized-exchange identity.
events.notes: The event preserves continuity between the OKEx and OKX identities rather than treating OKX as a new exchange.

evidence.title: Guide to OKX Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party OKX guide identifying the centralized exchange as founded in 2017 and headquartered in Seychelles.

evidence.title: OKX announces company-wide rebrand
evidence.notes: Company-issued press release announcing the January 18, 2022 OKEx-to-OKX rebrand.

evidence.title: We are changing our name and our brand identity
evidence.notes: First-party explanation of the OKEx-to-OKX brand transition and continuity of the platform.

evidence.title: OKX official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current official domain confirming active exchange operation.
